354→ 355→ @pytest.mark.asyncio 356→ async def test_right_arrow_cycles_to_next_view(self) -> None: 357→ """Right arrow cycles through views: PLANS → LEARN → OBJECTIVES → PLANS.""" 358→ provider = FakePlanDataProvider( 359→ plans=[make_plan_row(1, "Regular Plan")], 360→ plans_by_labels={ 361→ ("erk-learn",): [make_plan_row(2, "Learn Plan", is_learn_plan=True)], 362→ ("erk-objective",): [make_plan_row(10, "Objective A")], 363→ }, 364→ ) 365→ filters = PlanFilters.default() 366→ app = ErkDashApp( 367→ provider=provider, service=FakePlanService(), filters=filters, refresh_interval=0 368→ ) 369→ 370→ async with app.run_test() as pilot: 371→ await pilot.pause() 372→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.PLANS 373→ 374→ # Right arrow: PLANS → LEARN 375→ await pilot.press("right") 376→ await pilot.pause() 377→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.LEARN 378→ 379→ # Right arrow: LEARN → OBJECTIVES 380→ await pilot.press("right") 381→ await pilot.pause() 382→ await pilot.pause() 383→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.OBJECTIVES
... [25 lines omitted] ...

403→ ) 404→ 405→ async with app.run_test() as pilot: 406→ await pilot.pause() 407→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.PLANS 408→ 409→ # Left arrow: PLANS → OBJECTIVES (wrap-around) 410→ await pilot.press("left") 411→ await pilot.pause() 412→ await pilot.pause() 413→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.OBJECTIVES 414→ 415→ # Left arrow: OBJECTIVES → LEARN 416→ await pilot.press("left") 417→ await pilot.pause() 418→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.LEARN 419→ 420→ # Left arrow: LEARN → PLANS 421→ await pilot.press("left") 422→ await pilot.pause() 423→ assert app._view_mode == ViewMode.PLANS 424→ 425→ 426→def test_display_name_plans_view() -> None: 427→ """PLANS view returns 'PRs'.""" 428→ provider = FakePlanDataProvider() 429→ filters = PlanFilters.default() 430→ app = ErkDashApp( 431→ provider=provider, service=FakePlanService(), filters=filters, refresh_interval=0 432→ )

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #9041 implementation complete. PR submitted at https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9041
**Summary of changes:**
**New files:** - `src/erk/tui/widgets/run_table.py` — `RunDataTable` widget with 7 columns (run-id, status, submitted, workflow, pr, title, chks), click handlers for run/PR links, cursor preservation on refresh - `tests/tui/test_run_table.py` — 14 tests covering `RunRowData`, `RunDataTable`, `make_run_row` factory, and `FakePlanDataProvider.fetch_runs`
**Modified files:** - `src/erk/tui/views/types.py` — Added `ViewMode.RUNS` enum member and `RUNS_VIEW` config (key "4", empty labels, display "Runs") - `src/erk/tui/data/types.py` — Added `RunRowData` frozen dataclass with 15 fields - `src/erk/tui/data/provider_abc.py` — Added abstract `fetch_runs()` method to `PlanDataProvider` - `src/erk/tui/data/real_provider.py` — Implemented `fetch_runs()` porting logic from `_list_runs()` CLI command (workflow fetching, PR linkage, dedup, formatting) - `src/erk/tui/data/fake_provider.py` — Added `fetch_runs()`/`set_runs()` and `make_run_row()` factory - `packages/erk-shared/.../fake.py` — Added `fetch_runs()`/`set_runs()` to shared fake provider - `src/erk/tui/app.py` — Integrated runs tab: key "4" binding, `RunDataTable` in compose/mount, `_load_run_data()` async loader, table visibility toggling, run-specific click handlers - `src/erk/tui/screens/help_screen.py` — Added "4 Runs view" and runs-specific action hints - `tests/tui/views/test_types.py` — Updated for 4-view cycle - `tests/tui/test_view_bar.py` — Updated tab region calculations for 4 tabs - `tests/tui/app/test_view_switching.py` — Updated cycling tests for 4-view wraparound
